name: d_wk_bk
description: Chebyshev distance between the White King and Black King.

name: d_wk_p
description: Chebyshev distance between the White King and the Pawn.

name: d_bk_p
description: Chebyshev distance between the Black King and the Pawn.

name: m_wk_bk
description: Manhattan distance between the two kings.

name: m_wk_p
description: Manhattan distance between the White King and the Pawn.

name: m_bk_p
description: Manhattan distance between the Black King and the Pawn.

name: e2_wk_bk
description: Squared Euclidean distance between the two kings.

name: e2_wk_p
description: Squared Euclidean distance between the White King and the Pawn.

name: e2_bk_p
description: Squared Euclidean distance between the Black King and the Pawn.

name: pawn_rank
description: Rank of the pawn from White’s perspective (0–7).

name: pawn_rank_norm
description: Normalized pawn rank in the interval [0, 1].

name: pawn_file
description: File index of the pawn (0–7).

name: d_promo
description: Remaining rank distance until pawn promotion.

name: wk_bk_dr
description: Signed rank offset between White King and Black King.

name: wk_bk_df
description: Signed file offset between White King and Black King.

name: wk_p_dr
description: Signed rank offset between White King and the Pawn.

name: wk_p_df
description: Signed file offset between White King and the Pawn.

name: bk_p_dr
description: Signed rank offset between Black King and the Pawn.

name: bk_p_df
description: Signed file offset between Black King and the Pawn.

name: rank_gap
description: Absolute vertical separation between kings.

name: file_gap
description: Absolute horizontal separation between kings.

name: wk_edge
description: Minimum distance from the White King to the board edge.

name: bk_edge
description: Minimum distance from the Black King to the board edge.

name: p_edge
description: Minimum distance from the pawn to the board edge.

name: wk_mobility
description: Number of geometrically available adjacent squares for the White King.

name: bk_mobility
description: Number of geometrically available adjacent squares for the Black King.

name: wk_vs_p_rank
description: Signed rank ordering of the White King relative to the Pawn.

name: bk_vs_p_rank
description: Signed rank ordering of the Black King relative to the Pawn.

name: triangle_area2
description: Twice the area of the triangle formed by the two kings and the pawn.

name: turn
description: Side-to-move indicator.

name: d_wr_bk
description: Chebyshev distance between the White Rook and Black King.

name: d_wq_bk
description: Chebyshev distance between the White Queen and Black King.

name: d_wk_wr
description: Chebyshev distance between the White King and White Rook.

name: rook_cut_rank
description: Whether the rook cuts off the Black King along the rank.

name: rook_cut_file
description: Whether the rook cuts off the Black King along the file.

name: box_rank_gap
description: Rank separation defining one dimension of the confinement box.

name: box_file_gap
description: File separation defining one dimension of the confinement box.

name: box_area
description: Area of the rook–king confinement rectangle.

name: bk_on_edge
description: Whether the Black King is on the board edge.

name: bk_in_corner
formula: dist_to_edge(bk) == 0 AND file(bk) in {0,7} AND rank(bk) in {0,7}
description: Whether the Black King is in a corner square.

name: rook_protected
description: Whether the rook is protected by the White King.

name: bk_corner_distance
description: Chebyshev distance from Black King to nearest corner.

name: rank_opposition_parity
description: Kings on same file with odd separation (distant/direct opposition candidate).

name: file_opposition_parity
description: Kings on same rank with odd separation.

name: direct_opposition
description: Kings separated by one square on same rank or file.

name: diagonal_opposition
description: Kings aligned diagonally with parity enabling future direct opposition.

name: wk_controls_key_square
description: White king occupies a key square relative to the pawn.

name: bk_controls_promotion_square
description: Black king controls or occupies promotion path square.

name: corresponding_square_relation
description: Kings occupy corresponding critical squares.

name: wk_forward_penetration
description: Signed forward penetration distance of White King relative to pawn.

name: bk_blockade_zone
description: Black king in front-of-pawn blockade zone.

name: has_opposition_with_turn
formula: (direct_opposition OR rank_opposition_parity OR file_opposition_parity) XOR turn
description: Side not to move holds structural opposition.

name: wk_triangulation_potential
description: White can triangulate to gain opposition.

name: king_square_color_parity
description: Color parity of White king square.

name: kings_same_color_parity
description: Kings lie on same color squares.

name: outside_passed_pawn_potential
description: Pawn can act as outside passer forcing king displacement.

name: wk_triangle_mobility
description: White king mobility sufficient for triangulation loop.

name: bk_triangle_mobility
description: Black king mobility sufficient for triangulation loop.

name: wk_has_3cycle
description: White king has 3-move return cycle.

name: bk_has_3cycle
description: Black king has 3-move return cycle.

name: wk_spare_move_exists
description: White has tempo-preserving spare king move.

name: bk_spare_move_exists
description: Black has tempo-preserving spare king move.

name: wk_can_flip_opposition
description: White can triangulate to flip opposition.

name: bk_can_flip_opposition
description: Black can triangulate to flip opposition.

name: is_corresponding_pair
description: Kings occupy corresponding-squares pairing.

name: break_correspondence_in_3
description: White can break correspondence lock via triangulation.

name: push_gives_check
description: Pawn push gives check (often spoils opposition).

name: pawn_push_is_only_spare
description: Pawn push is only tempo attempt.

name: wr_has_3cycle
description: Rook triangulation loop exists.

name: wr_checking_cycle
description: Rook 3-move checking cycle exists.

name: side_to_move_in_trouble
formula: (turn==WHITE AND NOT wk_spare_move_exists) OR (turn==BLACK AND NOT bk_spare_move_exists)
description: Heuristic zugzwang indicator.

name: wdl_turn_sensitivity
description: Outcome depends on side to move (zugzwang).

name: reciprocal_zugzwang
description: Mutual zugzwang.

name: trebuchet
description: Extreme mutual zugzwang (trébuchet).

name: wk_worsening_moves_ratio
description: Fraction of White moves that worsen evaluation.

name: bk_worsening_moves_ratio
description: Fraction of Black moves that worsen evaluation.

name: move_degree_difference
description: Legal move count difference.

name: min_degree_side_to_move
description: Mobility floor of side to move.

name: mined_square_violation
description: King steps into mined correspondence square.

name: correspondence_lock_depth
description: Tempi required to escape correspondence pairing.

name: null_move_improves
description: Position improves if side could pass.

name: endgame_requires_zugzwang
description: Material class requires zugzwang to win.

name: tempo_burden_symmetry
description: Extra tempo is a burden (Zugzwang Lite).

name: tempo_penetration_gradient
description: Spatial gain/loss per forced tempo.

name: wk_corr_group
description: Correspondence group ID for White king square.

name: bk_corr_group
description: Correspondence group ID for Black king square.

name: is_corresponding_square_pair
description: Kings occupy same correspondence class.

name: wk_corr_group_size
description: Size of White correspondence class.

name: bk_corr_group_size
description: Size of Black correspondence class.

name: corr_group_size_delta
description: Asymmetry in correspondence maneuvering space.

name: wk_next_corr_groups_count
description: Distinct correspondence groups reachable next by White.

name: bk_next_corr_groups_count
description: Distinct correspondence groups reachable next by Black.

name: wk_corr_threat_fanout
description: Threat fan-out in correspondence space.

name: wk_on_mined_square
description: White on mined-square class.

name: bk_on_mined_square
description: Black on mined-square class.

name: mined_square_contact
description: Mutual mined-square contact.

name: wk_dist_to_nearest_key
description: Distance from White king to nearest key square.

name: bk_dist_to_key_defense
description: Distance from Black king to defensive key squares.

name: key_squares_spread
description: Spread of pawn key squares.

name: bk_can_reply_to_wk_corr
description: Defender can reach required correspondence reply.

name: local_corr_reply_exists
description: Local existence of correspondence reply.

name: corr_pressure
description: Side-to-move advantage in correspondence maneuvering space.
